assignments.name: raw_text
assignments.value: Cargo Hose JIS 10K 150A PCD 280mm 8 Holes SS316 Material Pressure Rating 10 Bar

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO requisitions 
  (filename, product_name, standard, size, pcd, holes, material, pressure)
VALUES 
  ('{{ $json.filename }}',
   '{{ $json.product_name }}',
   '{{ $json.standard }}',
   '{{ $json.size }}',
   '{{ $json.pcd }}',
   {{ $json.holes }},
   '{{ $json.material }}',
   '{{ $json.pressure_rating }}')
RETURNING id, product_name, created_at;
